title.en: Surgical clothing and drapes - Requirements and test methods - Part 1: Surgical drapes and gowns
title.zh: 手术衣物和手术铺单 - 要求和试验方法 - 第1部分：手术铺单和手术衣

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and test methods for surgical drapes, gowns, and clean air suits used in healthcare facilities.
standards.scope: Surgical clothing and drapes -- Requirements and test methods -- Surgical drapes and gowns.

title.en: Test methods for primary wound dressings - Aspects of absorbency, moisture vapour transmission rate, waterproofness and extensibility
title.zh: 初级伤口敷料的试验方法 - 吸收性、水蒸气透过率、防水性和延展性

standards.abstract: Specifies test methods for evaluation of absorption, moisture vapour transmission rate, waterproofness and extensibility of wound dressings. Replaces EN 13726 parts 1-4.
standards.scope: Performance testing of wound dressings (absorption, MVTR, waterproof, extensibility).

title.en: Implants for surgery - Absorbable implants - General guidelines and requirements for assessment of absorbable metallic implants
title.zh: 外科植入物 - 可吸收植入物 - 可吸收金属植入物评估的一般指南和要求

standards.abstract: Establishes approaches and special considerations for evaluating in vitro and in vivo performance of absorbable metals and implants. Published 2025-05.
standards.scope: Assessment of absorbable metallic implants (degradation, fatigue, biological evaluation).
standards.title_en: Implants for surgery - Absorbable implants - General guidelines and requirements for assessment of absorbable metallic implants
standards.title_zh: 外科植入物 - 可吸收植入物 - 可吸收金属植入物评估的一般指南和要求

title.en: Test methods for nonwoven compresses for medical use - Part 1: Nonwoven compresses, all cotton or containing cotton
title.zh: 医用无纺布敷料的试验方法 - 第1部分：全棉或含棉无纺布敷料

standards.abstract: Specifies test methods for nonwoven compresses used for medical purposes. Covers absorbency, mass, dimensions, and fibre composition.
standards.title_en: Test methods for nonwoven compresses for medical use - Part 1: Nonwovens used in the manufacture of compresses
standards.title_zh: 医用无纺布敷料试验方法 - 第1部分：用于制造敷料的无纺布

title.en: Surgical clothing and drapes - Requirements and test methods - Part 2: Clean air suits
title.zh: 手术衣物和铺巾 - 要求和试验方法 - 第2部分：洁净空气服

standards.abstract: Specifies requirements and test methods for clean air suits used in operating theatres and other clean areas to reduce body dispersal of viable particles.
standards.scope: Clean air surgical suits for operating theatre environments.
